wreck_wake.text: You open your eyes to the sound of waves crashing against broken timber. The storm has passed, but your ship lies in ruins.

first_steps.text: The sand is warm beneath your feet. This island, though small, may be your salvation.

first_build.text: With the wreckage as your foundation, you begin to build. Every civilization starts with a single stone.

level_3.text: Your settlement grows. The island responds to your touch, yielding its treasures.

level_5.text: Word of your island reaches distant shores. Merchants and travellers take notice.

level_8.text: Your castrum stands ready. The Mediterranean is vast, and not all who sail it come in peace.

level_10.text: A temple rises from the hilltop. The gods themselves watch your progress with interest.

first_raid.text: Longships appear on the horizon. The Sea People have found you.

victory.text: The raiders retreat! Your defences hold. But they will return.

defeat.text: They have plundered your stores. Build stronger. Fight harder.

rome.text: Roma Aeterna. The eagle standard flies once more. Build an empire worthy of the Senate and People of Rome.

carthage.text: Carthage shall rise again. Let the purple sails of your merchant fleet dominate these waters.

egypt.text: By the grace of Ra, a new kingdom begins. The sun never sets on the children of the Nile.

greece.text: Athena guides your hand. Philosophy, democracy, and the shield wall shall be your legacy.

seapeople.text: The sea is your home, the waves your allies. Take what you need. Leave nothing behind.

persia.text: The King of Kings builds anew. Let the royal road stretch from shore to shore.

phoenicia.text: Masters of trade, rulers of the sea. Your purple dye shall colour the world.

gaul.text: Freedom runs in your veins. The sacred oak shelters your people. Let none stand against the war band.

first_sail.text: The open sea stretches before you. Distant islands shimmer on the horizon.

vulcan.text: The air grows thick with sulphur. Mount Vulcan smoulders ahead, promising both danger and treasure.

hyperborea.text: Ice crystals catch the light. Hyperborea, the frozen north. What secrets lie beneath the frost?

necropolis.text: The dead do not rest easy here. Tread carefully among the ancient tombs.
